ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "pair_number" INTEGER /* The pair number associated with the question */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition of the question */,
  "noun" TEXT /* Noun associated with the question */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question being asked */,
  "question_index" INTEGER /* Index number for reference in the assessment */,
  "difficulty_score" INTEGER /* Numeric score representing the difficulty level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the question is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the question */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question being answered */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "answer" INTEGER /* Response given by the participant (e.g., 1 for Yes, 0 for No) */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicator for whether the answer is correct (1 for Yes, 0 for No) */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken by the participant to answer the question */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the participant in their answer (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the answer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the answer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for follow-up or reporting */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the participant is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the participant was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the participant's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant taking the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the assessment (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., Low, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* Numeric range for the difficulty score (e.g., 1-3 for Low, 4-5 for High) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the condition is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the condition was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the condition */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment being reported */,
  "correct_answers" INTEGER /* Number of correct answers given */,
  "total_questions" INTEGER /* Total number of questions in the assessment */,
  "accuracy_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of correct answers */,
  "average_response_time" TEXT /* Average time taken to answer questions */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Average confidence level of the participant */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for login and communication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Researcher, Administrator) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
